Records.authors: Marzucca, Robin, McLeod, Andrew J., Nega, Christoph
Records.description: Two-loop integral family for mixed QCD-EW corrections to $gg \to H$ at $\mathcal{O}(g^3 g_s^2)$, where the Higgs couples to a top quark. This family depends only on $s$ and $m_t$ (like Family 1) and evaluates to multiple polylogarithms with symbol alphabet $\{x, 1+x, 1-x\}$ after the same rationalization as Family 1. Contains 5 master integrals computed through $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^2)$ (weight 6). The top-level topology is the same hexagonal structure as Family 1 but with different mass assignments on the propagators: $D_5=(k_2-p_1)^2$ is massless and $D_7=k_2^2-m_t^2$ is massive (swapped relative to Family 1). The Higgs leg exits at a different vertex. Previously computed in the pure QCD context.
ancillaryPaths: ancillary files on arXiv and Zenodo (doi:10.5281/zenodo.14843619)
